documentation.content: ERROR-severity logs from the AcumenAI API or the GCS ingest function. Includes agent audit-fallback errors (BQ-unreachable stderr JSON). Check vtx_audit.audit_log for the matching AGENT_ERROR rows.

conditionMatchedLog.filter: severity >= ERROR AND (resource.type = "cloud_run_revision" OR resource.type = "cloud_function") AND resource.labels.project_id = "vtx-accounting-os-prod"
